full_text:
Zhang Xi 張喜
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhang Xi (張喜)was born in Runan. An excellency. Sent to make peace between Li Jue and Guo Si. Zhang Xi was affiliated with the Han Dynasty, Li Jue, and the Wei Kingdom.
